title: HTTP Server Zone
description: NginxHTTPServerZone schema from NGINX Plus REST API

processing.description: The number of client requests that are currently being processed.

requests.description: The total number of client requests received from clients.

responses.description: The total number of responses sent to clients, the number of responses with status codes “1xx”, “2xx”, “3xx”, “4xx”, and “5xx”, and the number of responses per each status code.

1xx.description: The number of responses with “1xx” status codes.

2xx.description: The number of responses with “2xx” status codes.

3xx.description: The number of responses with “3xx” status codes.

4xx.description: The number of responses with “4xx” status codes.

5xx.description: The number of responses with “5xx” status codes.

codes.description: The number of responses per each status code.

codeNumber.description: The number of responses with this particular status code.

total.description: The total number of responses sent to clients.

discarded.description: The total number of requests completed without sending a response.

received.description: The total number of bytes received from clients.

sent.description: The total number of bytes sent to clients.

handshakes.description: The total number of successful SSL handshakes.

handshakes_failed.description: The total number of failed SSL handshakes.

session_reuses.description: The total number of session reuses during SSL handshake.

no_common_protocol.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of no common protocol.

no_common_cipher.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of no shared cipher.

handshake_timeout.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of a timeout.

peer_rejected_cert.description: The number of failed SSL handshakes when nginx presented the certificate to the client but it was rejected with a corresponding alert message.

no_cert.description: A client did not provide the required certificate.

expired_cert.description: An expired or not yet valid certificate was presented by a client.

revoked_cert.description: A revoked certificate was presented by a client.
